how.headline: Ready in 3 Steps
how.subtext: From booking to riding — simple as that.
how.step1Body: Choose your vehicle, pick your date, and pay securely online in minutes. Weekends fill fast — lock in your spot before someone else does.
how.step2Body: Chris meets you at pickup, walks you through the vehicle, and answers any questions. Quick briefing — then you're ready to roll.
how.step3Body: Explore Central PA on three wheels. No motorcycle experience needed — just a valid driver's license and a sense of adventure.

Book Your

cta.body: Weekends fill up fast — reserve your ride in minutes.

faqs.question: Do I need a motorcycle license?
faqs.answer: No. In Pennsylvania the Slingshot is classified as an autocycle — a regular driver's license is all you need.

faqs.question: Where is pickup located?
faqs.answer: Based in Lancaster, PA. Exact pickup details are confirmed after booking. Reserve your date online and Chris will follow up with location info.

faqs.question: How do I book?
faqs.answer: Book directly on this page — choose your vehicle, pick your date, and pay securely online. Weekends fill up fast, so reserve early.

faqs.question: Is the rental insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. All rentals include coverage. Full details are provided at booking confirmation. Questions? Reach out through the contact info provided after you reserve.

faqs.question: Are the Slingshots automatic or manual?
faqs.answer: Our Polaris Slingshots are manual transmission — and that's actually a good thing. Many drivers find manual far more engaging and thrilling than an automatic slingshot. The extra control makes the ride feel more connected and exciting.

faqs.question: Can I take it on the highway?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Both the Slingshot and Spyder are highway-capable and perfect for scenic routes across Central PA.
